data.title: CoinDesk 20 Index Sees Positive Movement With HBAR And AVAX Leading Gains
data.description:
According to CoinDesk, the CoinDesk 20 Index has shown a positive trend, currently trading at 2612.1, marking an increase of 0.8% or 19.92 points since 4 p.m. ET on Tuesday. This index, which is a comprehensive measure of the cryptocurrency market, reflects the performance of 20 major digital assets across various platforms and regions worldwide.

Out of the 20 assets included in the index, twelve have recorded gains. Leading the upward movement are HBAR and AVAX, which have risen by 4.4% and 4.2%, respectively. These assets have contributed significantly to the overall positive performance of the index. On the other hand, some assets have not fared as well. APT and AAVE have emerged as the laggards, experiencing declines of 5.7% and 4.2%, respectively. Despite these setbacks, the overall trend for the CoinDesk 20 remains positive, indicating a robust market environment for digital assets.

data.title: Ark Invest Maintains Optimistic Outlook On Bitcoin Amid Market Decline
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, despite a significant market downturn in March, Cathie Wood's investment firm Ark Invest remains optimistic about Bitcoin. On Tuesday, Ark Invest released a report expressing confidence in Bitcoin's long-term prospects. The firm believes that policy changes and technological advancements in fields like artificial intelligence and robotics will reignite spending and boost productivity.

Ark Invest also highlighted that deregulation and tax cuts could be key drivers for Bitcoin's recovery from the current market turmoil. The report noted that the market has become overly pessimistic about the current macroeconomic and geopolitical climate.

data.title: Top Trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio Closes Bitcoin Short Position
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on March 12, top trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio announced on his personal channel that he has closed a short position on Bitcoin, which was opened earlier in the evening at $84,200. Ng Ah Sio stated that these trades have little impact on his overall profit and loss but help him better understand market trends and maintain sharpness for when it truly matters.

data.title: Bolivia To Use Cryptocurrency For Energy Imports Amid Economic Challenges
data.description: According to Odaily, Bolivia's state-owned energy company, YBFB, plans to utilize cryptocurrency for paying energy import fees. This decision comes as the country faces a shortage of foreign exchange reserves and a decline in natural gas exports. Bolivia aims to follow the example of countries like Argentina and Venezuela, which have adopted cryptocurrency for energy purchases.

data.title: Web3 game developer M10 completes $3 million seed round of financing, Sui Foundation participates
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: M10, a Web3 game developer and publisher focusing on developing competitive multiplayer games, has completed a $3 million seed round of financing. This round of financing was participated by Sui Foundation, GSR, Big Brain Holdings, Monoceros, Blockchain Founders Fund and Presto Labs. It is reported that M10’s strategic partnership with Sui Foundation will enable it to create a new game business model beyond F2P. (VentureBeat)

data.title: Market Outlook Remains Bearish Amid Trade Policy Concerns
data.description: According to Odaily, Greeks.live has released a community briefing indicating a predominantly bearish sentiment in the short term. The report suggests that U.S. President Donald Trump's trade policies and market manipulation are expected to continue exerting downward pressure. Traders identify the $82,000-$84,000 range as a significant resistance level. There is ongoing debate among traders regarding the possibility of a relief rally or a 'hamburger-style' sell-off, with some opting to quickly take profits following recent market rebounds.

data.title: Fed Expected To Resume Rate Cuts In July, Futures Indicate
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on March 12, short-term interest rate futures prices suggest that the Federal Reserve is anticipated to resume rate cuts in July, rather than in June.

data.title: Bitdeer Reports Decline In February Bitcoin Mining Output
data.description: According to PANews, Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer has released its unaudited mining and operations update for February 2025. The report reveals that the company mined 110 BTC during the month, marking a decrease from January 2025. The decline is attributed to the shorter number of days in February. Bitdeer currently holds 1,039 BTC.

data.title: Bitdeer: Mined 110 BTC in February and currently holds 1,039 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer released an unaudited mining and operations update report for February 2025, which disclosed that self-mining produced 110 BTC, a decrease from January 2025 due to fewer days in February. The company currently holds 1,039 BTC. As customers continue to dispose of less efficient mining equipment, the number of client-hosted machines decreased by 17,000 in February. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Greeks.live: After the recent rebound, some traders quickly took profits. $82,000-84,000 is the current key resistance level for BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.live released a community briefing saying that the community is mainly bearish in the short term, and Trump's trade policies and market manipulation are expected to continue to bring downward pressure. Traders regard $82,000-84,000 as an important resistance level. There continues to be some disagreement on whether there will be a relief rebound or a "hamburger-style" sell-off. Some traders quickly took profits after seeing the recent market rebound.
